_note: Signal D classification-correctness reference (autoresearch round 2, RE-PROPOSED). TWO categories only: present | legitimately-absent. RULE (objective, heading-exists): an item is 'present' iff its 'Item X' heading physically EXISTS in the filing body -- regardless of content (substantive text, 'None.', 'Not applicable', or a 'see proxy' incorporated-by-reference section the segmenter finds). It is 'legitimately-absent' iff there is NO 'Item X' heading at all (genuinely omitted, template-allowed: optional / N/A / not-yet-effective). 'None.' is an answer, not a missing section -> present. There is NO 'incorporated-by-reference' category (a headed see-proxy item is present). Labels are read-located from each filing's raw structure AND reconciled against what production actually outputs (header-occurrence counts + production status); where production is right (headed item -> present) the gold agrees; where production is wrong (a no-heading item it flags as extraction_failure) the gold says legitimately-absent and Signal D reports the mismatch. This file is HUMAN-ONLY (guard G7): the autoloop may PROPOSE but may not freeze or edit it.
_audit_status: PROPOSED (re-proposed under the heading-exists + drop-incorporated rules) -- AWAITING HUMAN AUDIT. NOT frozen until audited. 'notable' lists cells where production DISAGREES with the gold (production flags a no-heading item as extraction_failure) -- the auditor should confirm these are genuine no-heading era/scope exclusions.

apple-fy2024.provenance: read-located + production-reconciled: every Item 1-16 has a body heading (production = present for all; header occ=2 each = TOC + body). All present under heading-exists.

msft-fy2023.provenance: read-located + production-reconciled: all items headed EXCEPT Item 1C (header occ=0; FY ended June 2023, before the 1C effective date -> no heading -> legitimately-absent). Production wrongly flags 1C as extraction_failure (template keys on fy>=2023, not the FY-end date) -> Signal D mismatch (a real, out-of-scope-for-round-2 production error).

msft-fy1996.provenance: read-located + production-reconciled: SGML 1996 has body headings for Items 1-14 (present). Items 1A/1B/1C/7A/9A/9B/9C/15/16 have NO heading (occ=0; pre-modern items did not exist in 1996) -> legitimately-absent. Production wrongly flags 7A/9A/15 as extraction_failure (template expects modern items) -> Signal D mismatch (real era-template error, out of round-2 scope).

chemed-amend-fy2024.provenance: read-located + production-reconciled: this 10-K/A contains ONLY body headings for Item 5 and Item 15 (occ=1 each). Every other item has NO heading (occ=0) -> legitimately-absent (out of the amendment's scope). Production form-blindly flags 10 of them (1,1A,1C,2,3,7,7A,8,9,9A) as extraction_failure -> Signal D mismatch = the form-blind bug the form-aware fix must correct.

scwo-fy2025-amend.provenance: read-located + production-reconciled: this 10-K/A has body headings for Part III Items 10-14 and Item 15 (occ>=1, present) -- the amendment supplies Part III the original incorporated. Part I and Part II items 5-9 have NO heading (occ=0) -> legitimately-absent. Production form-blindly flags 11 of them (1,1A,1C,2,3,5,7,7A,8,9,9A) as extraction_failure -> Signal D mismatch = the form-blind bug.
